languages.text: {n}Высокое создание напоминает человека лишь отдаленно. Опираясь на металлические щупальца, служащие ему вместо ног, оно окидывает вас взглядом единственного глаза, тускло светящегося в полумраке.{/n}
{n}The tall creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal tentacles that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Высокое создание напоминает человека лишь отдаленно. Опираясь на металлические щупальца, служащие ему вместо ног, оно окидывает вас взглядом единственного глаза, тускло светящегося в полумраке.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The tall creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal tentacles that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom.{/n}
{n}The tall creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal tentacles that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom.{/n}

{n}The tall, emaciated creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal stalks that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom. Lunging forward, it speaks a few words in a guttural language full of clanking and strange moaning sounds.{/n}
{n}The tall creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal tentacles that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom.{/n}
{n}The tall creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal tentacles that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom.{/n}

languages.text: {n}背が高く、痩せ細ったその姿は、人間としか言えないほど遠く離れている。金属製の脚で支えられ、その姿は暗闇の中で、わずかに光る1つの目であなたを見つめている。前方に飛び出し、金属音と奇妙な唸り声で満たされた言語で数語を話す。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The tall, emaciated creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal stalks that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom. Lunging forward, it speaks a few words in a guttural language full of clanking and strange moaning sounds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}背が高く、痩せ細ったその姿は、人間としか言えないほど遠く離れている。金属製の脚で支えられ、その姿は暗闇の中で、わずかに光る1つの目であなたを見つめている。前方に飛び出し、金属音と奇妙な唸り声で満たされた gutturalな言語で数語を話す。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La criatura tiene un parecido muy remoto con un ser humano. Se sostiene sobre unos tentáculos de metal que hacen las veces de piernas y te mira con un solo ojo que brilla tenuemente en la penumbra.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The tall creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal tentacles that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La criatura tiene un parecido muy remoto con un ser humano. Se sostiene sobre unos tentáculos de metal que hacen las veces de piernas y te mira con un solo ojo que brilla tenuemente en la penumbra.{/n}

languages.text: {n}那高个子生物与人类几乎没有相似之处。它靠充当双腿的金属触手直立着，用在黑暗中微微发光的独眼，死死地盯着你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The tall creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal tentacles that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}那高个子生物与人类几乎没有相似之处。它靠充当双腿的金属触手直立着，用在黑暗中微微发光的独眼，死死地盯着你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die hochgewachsene Kreatur erinnert nur entfernt an einen Menschen. Sie steht aufrecht auf metallenen Tentakeln und mustert dich mit einem einzelnen im Zwielicht schimmernden Auge.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The tall creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal tentacles that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die hochgewachsene Kreatur erinnert nur entfernt an einen Menschen. Sie steht aufrecht auf metallenen Tentakeln und mustert dich mit einem einzelnen im Zwielicht schimmernden Auge.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Uzun yaratık, bir insanı sadece uzaktan andırıyor. Bacak işlevi gören metal dokunaçların üzerinde dik duran yaratık, loşlukta sönükçe parlayan tek gözüyle sana bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The tall creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal tentacles that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Uzun yaratık, bir insanı sadece uzaktan andırıyor. Bacak işlevi gören metal dokunaçların üzerinde dik duran yaratık, loşlukta sönükçe parlayan tek gözüyle sana bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La grande créature ne ressemble que de très loin à un être humain. Debout sur les tentacules métalliques qui lui servent de jambes, elle vous fixe de son œil unique qui luit faiblement dans la pénombre.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The tall creature resembles a human only remotely. Held upright on the metal tentacles that serve as its legs, it stares at you with a single eye that glows dimly in the gloom.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La grande créature ne ressemble que de très loin à un être humain. Debout sur les tentacules métalliques qui lui servent de jambes, elle vous fixe de son œil unique qui luit faiblement dans la pénombre.{/n}
